## Identity

Alys Quorwyn weds Perrin Harrow — the ENABLES source that makes the Quiet
Mile crossing possible, and through it the whole war downstream. A hub with
one reified beat (the seating of the Harrows) and, deliberately, zero role
edges of its own — the wedding itself was never the site of anyone's
agency, only the precondition for someone else's.
